overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spacecraft taxiing through a rainy, neon-lit sci-fi city at night, approaching and entering the TEASA Spaceport hangar bay. The footage shows high-fidelity game engine graphics with holographic HUD elements and detailed environmental lighting typical of Star Citizen.

events.description: city neon lights become more prominent as craft approaches spaceport structure
spaceport signage becomes visible on the left side of the approach

agents.ego_description: taxiing spacecraft toward the spaceport entrance through rainy night conditions with holographic HUD active

entered.detail: distant illuminated buildings against dark night sky with atmospheric haze
tall futuristic structures with glowing yellow and blue signage
wet reflective concrete landing surface with painted markings

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft approaches the spaceport through a dark, rainy night. The city skyline glows in the distance with neon-lit buildings on the right, while the wet landing pad reflects the ambient light. The holographic cockpit HUD displays flight information as the craft taxis forward.

events.description: passing under the large illuminated TEASA SPACEPORT overhead signage
pilot looks down toward side console controls and throttle

agents.ego_description: continuing to taxi forward under the spaceport structure toward the hangar entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated overhead sign reading TEASA SPACEPORT spanning the approach
massive structural columns supporting the spaceport canopy
massive structural columns supporting the spaceport canopy

segments.scene_description: The craft passes under the massive TEASA SPACEPORT sign, entering the sheltered canopy area. Large support pillars flank both sides while the neon buildings remain visible to the right. The lighting shifts to a mix of exterior city glow and interior artificial illumination.

events.description: camera tilts down to show pilot's hands manipulating flight controls
camera returns to forward-facing position facing the hangar

agents.ego_description: pilot manipulating flight controls and throttle with visible hand movements on the side console

entered.detail: illuminated control panel with buttons and holographic display readouts
physical throttle lever with glowing orange accents

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to the cockpit interior, focusing on the pilot's hands adjusting the throttle and side console controls. The holographic HUD remains visible while the exterior spaceport structure is no longer in view. The camera then returns to the forward-facing position.

events.description: spacecraft enters the hangar bay structure through the main entrance
interior hangar lighting replaces exterior city glow with bright artificial illumination

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the spacecraft into the designated hangar bay 4, aligning with the landing zone

entered.detail: massive industrial hangar entrance marked with the number 4
illuminated green medical cross symbol mounted above the hangar entrance
bright overhead lighting arrays illuminating the interior bay

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft enters hangar bay 4, passing under the green medical cross symbol. The environment transitions from the dark exterior to a brightly lit industrial interior with massive structural walls. The craft continues forward into the hangar, aligning with the landing zone markers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit as it transitions from a rainy, neon-lit city night into the brightly lit industrial interior of a spaceport hangar. It begins with the craft taxiing across a wet landing pad toward a glowing city skyline, with a holographic HUD overlaying the view of the dark, rainy environment. As the spacecraft passes under the massive TEASA SPACEPORT sign, the scene shifts from the open exterior to a sheltered canopy area flanked by large support pillars. The camera then briefly pivots inward to focus on the pilot's hands adjusting the throttle and console controls before returning to the forward view. Finally, the craft glides under a green medical cross symbol and enters hangar bay 4, where the dark city glow is replaced by the intense artificial lighting of a massive industrial bay.
